0:
You can't help but notice how awfully busy C'zibho Tia looks─it would be a shame to leave him to his own devices.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

You can't help but notice how awfully busy C'zibho Tia looks─it would be a shame to leave him to his own devices.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
C'zibho Tia can barely keep up with the appetites of Costa del Sol's faire-goers, and needs someone to help him prepare servings of battered fish. He informs you that the main ingredient, haddock, can be purchased from a nearby stall. Once you have prepared the battered fish, bring it to C'zibho Tia before he runs out of food to sell.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
